title: Ordinance Amending Section 13 and Section 14 Subsection 14.1 of Municipal Ordinance No. 2015-1403 Dated January 19, 2015 Entitled "an Ordinance Prescribing Guidelines and Policies on the Operation and Management of the Basic Emergency Obstetrics and the Newborn (bemonc) Facilities in the Municipality of Los Baños, Laguna and for Other Purposes.
